Descriptions:
VS-150 Multifunctional Veterinary Stethoscope delivers accurate auscultation of heart, lung, and Korotkoff sounds with acoustic integrity and clarity. An ergonomic design ensures comfort for the veterinarians and patient animals, even during extended use. VS-100 is a premier diagnostic instrument with unmatched performance, durability, and aesthetics for large, middle or small animals.
Applications
VS-150 is commonly used to auscultate animal vital sings in heart, lung, pulse, etc.
1. Animal cardiovascular: to listen to heart rate, heart sounds, heart murmurs, etc.
2. Animal respiratory: to listen to lung breath sounds, to distinguish lung lesions.
3. When measuring animal blood pressure, it is used to amplify the pulse sound for veterinary diagnosis.
4. When measuring animal fetal sound, it is used to auscultate the heart sound of the fetus during pregnancy.
Features
1. The diaphragm is made of high-quality polyester material, which is resistant to abrasion and has no distortion.
2. The auscultation head is made of high-quality zinc alloy material with excellent workmanship. The rotating shaft of turning 180 degrees can smoothly switch the auscultation surface flexibly. The earrings are adjustable and balanced.
3. The hose is soft and anti-aging.
4. The earplugs are made of imported high-elastic PVC synthetic material, which is comfortable to wear and does not leak sound. It is easy to disassemble and clean.
5. VS-100 multi-function veterinary stethoscope is a universal design, equipped with a double-sided flat hearing blocks and large, medium and small three-sized bell-shaped auscultation head, which can be combined into five different auscultation methods to meet the veterinary demands:
a) Large flat block: mainly auscultate heart low frequency sound, diastolic sound and high frequency heart murmur for large and medium animals.
b) Small flat block: mainly auscultate high-frequency heart sounds and murmurs for small animals.
c) Large bell-shaped head: to auscultate low, medium-frequency sounds and murmurs for large and medium animals.
d) Medium bell-shaped head: used for narrow areas such as ribs, to auscultate low, mid-frequency and murmurs.
e) Small bell-shaped head: to auscultate the low-frequency sounds and murmurs for small animals and newborn animals, and also to detect fetal heart sounds (heartbeats) for pregnant animals.

descricao:
1. Mobile CT X-Ray Tube (New Technology)
Our exclusive patented novel W-cathode X-ray tube with complete secondary electron self-shielding mobile CT X-ray tubes. These new X-ray tubes can reduce the influence of scattered photons on the image quality at the source and prolong the life of the X-ray tubes.
2. Modular Detector System (Improve Resolution)
High-resolution modular detector system is built with high stability precision mechanical structure to  improve  image  spatial  resolution.  It  helps  generate excellent  CT  imaging  quality  and  improve  spatial  resolution  by  two  grades compared with similar product in the market.
3. self-shielding X-Ray protection（Reduce Rad Dose)
The lead shield and curtain are installed on the X-ray source and turntable, inside and outside of the shell to reduce the external scattering of the X-ray. The test  results  show  that  the  central  radiation  dose  is  56%  lower  than similar product in the market. when standing two meters away, the dose is significantly lower than national radiation protection standards.
4. Linear precision Guide Rail（stable and precise)
our linear guide rail design allows much more accurate axial sliding scanning in a fast and smooth manner with superior scan control and stability.  It resolved the flat surface installation challenge that are commonly seen in other mobile CTs in the market.
5. Vibration/Shock Absorber (Vibration Proof)
Our  3-directional   multi-spiral  vibration/shock  absorber  can  effectively   reduce vibration  impact  and  potential  damage  to  the  mobile  CT.  It  not  only  further reduces  the  vibration  interference  challenge  during scanning but  also  allows mobile CT scanning to be performed while vehicle/ship/helicopter.
6. Vehicle Floor Mount (Quick Release ）
Latch  type  floor   mount  device  enable   16-slice  mobile  CT  to   be  quickly   loaded  and mounted onto vehicle such as ambulance, hospital ship and rescue helicopter. It expands mobile CT’s use in pre-hospital settings with reduced operating cost.

l
450nm Blue Laser
Traditional laser needs tip initiation to cut soft tissue, which is
time-consuming and highly dependent on operator’s experience. The cutting
efficiency is dramatically different between good and bad tip initiation. Blue
laser is strongly absorbed by proteins, with 60 times absorption higher than
that of traditional lasers. It can cut tissues at very high speed without tip
initiation to reduce thermal damage and guarantee the excellent repeatability
of cutting effect.
l
980 / 810nm Near Infrared Laser
With strong anti-bacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, it is very suitable
for urinary tract infection and edema.
l
635nm Red Laser
635nm is in the optical window of tissue, so it can penetrate very deep to
reach the affected area. With excellent photobiomodulation effect, it is very
suitable for laser therapy, such as pain relief and wound healing acceleration.

VS-100
Multifunctional Veterinary Stethoscope delivers accurate auscultation of heart,
lung, and Korotkoff sounds with acoustic integrity and clarity. An ergonomic
design ensures comfort for the veterinarians and patient animals, even during
extended use. VS-100 is a premier diagnostic instrument with unmatched
performance, durability, and aesthetics for large, middle or small animals.
Applications
VS-100
is commonly used to auscultate animal vital sings in heart, lung, pulse, etc.
1.
Animal cardiovascular: to listen to heart rate, heart sounds, heart murmurs,
etc.
2.
Animal respiratory: to listen to lung breath sounds, to distinguish lung
lesions.
3.
When measuring animal blood pressure, it is used to amplify the pulse sound for
veterinary diagnosis.
4.
When measuring animal fetal sound, it is used to auscultate the heart sound of
the fetus during pregnancy.
Features
1.
The diaphragm is made of high-quality polyester material, which is resistant to
abrasion and has no distortion.
2.
The auscultation head is made of high-quality zinc alloy material with
excellent workmanship. The rotating shaft of turning 180 degrees can smoothly
switch the auscultation surface flexibly. The earrings are adjustable and
balanced.
3.
The hose is soft and anti-aging.
4.
The earplugs are made of imported high-elastic PVC synthetic material, which is
comfortable to wear and does not leak sound. It is easy to disassemble and
clean.
5.
VS-100 multi-function veterinary stethoscope is a universal design, equipped
with a double-sided flat hearing blocks and large, medium and small three-sized
bell-shaped auscultation head, which can be combined into five different
auscultation methods to meet the veterinary demands:
a)
Large flat block: mainly auscultate heart low frequency sound, diastolic sound
and high frequency heart murmur for large and medium animals.
b)
Small flat block: mainly auscultate high-frequency heart sounds and murmurs for
small animals.
c)
Large bell-shaped head: to auscultate low, medium-frequency sounds and murmurs for
large and medium animals.
d)
Medium bell-shaped head: used for narrow areas such as ribs, to auscultate low,
mid-frequency and murmurs.
e)
Small bell-shaped head: to auscultate the low-frequency sounds and murmurs for
small animals and newborn animals, and also to detect fetal heart sounds (heartbeats)
for pregnant animals.
